title: Flyconid
move_pattern: First turn randomly picks from: Frail Spores (weight 2) or Smash (weight 1), no repeats. After each subsequent move, randomly picks from: Vulnerable Spores (weight 3), Frail Spores (weight 2), or Smash (weight 1), no repeats.
notes: Vulnerable Spores is unavailable on the very first turn (not in the INITIAL branch). From turn two onward it is the most likely move (weight 3 vs 2 and 1). No move can repeat consecutively.
